Aroostook County Superior Court - Caribo: In preparation for the launch of Maine eCourts and eFiling in Region 8 courts, the Aroostook County Superior Court in Caribou will be closed all day to the public beginning Wednesday, May 20th through Friday, May 29th. Monday, June 1st through Thursday, June 4th, the court will be closed in the mornings, from 8am to noon. Please see the Region 8 Maine eCourts Deployment notice for more information and instructions on how to submit an emergency filing when the court is closed.

Rumford District Court: Wednesday, April 29, 2026, the Rumford District Court will be closing to the public at noon for the remainder of the day. All remote Family Matters dockets for the afternoon will proceed as scheduled and clerks will be available by phone.
